reviews.comment:
No se porque pero en los ultimos meses cargue combustible varias veces y siguen teniendo un "problema" con el sistema que no les permite emitir factura tipo A si se paga con la APP YPF, podrian solucionarlo de una vez y poder hacerlo al igual que otras Ypf y Aca. La atencion e higiene muy buena, deberian ver la forma de poder agilizar la atencion del mercado Full ya que siempre se hace fila y demora mucho la parada.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know why, but I've filled up with fuel several times in the last few months, and they're still having a "problem" with the system that prevents them from issuing a Type A invoice if paid with the YPF app. They could fix this once and for all and be able to do it like other YPF stores and ACA. The service and hygiene are very good. They should find a way to streamline service at the Full market, since there are always lines and it takes a long time to stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2bU5qZkRREAE

reviews.comment:
Este ACA es la primera (viniendo del norte) o última (viniendo del sur) que tiene el régimen de nafta barata correspondiente a la zona patagónica. Téngase presente.

(Translated by Google)
This ACA is the first (coming from the north) or last (coming from the south) that has the low-price gasoline program corresponding to the Patagonian region. Please keep this in mind.
